newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The relevant fundamental backdrop remains the Feb 12, 2026 FY26 guidance: sales mid-single-digit % below 2025 (EUR1,347M base), EBITDA margin 20-24%, EBIT significantly below prior year, with a subdued start and continued price pressure outside long-term agreements. 300mm end-markets grow while 200mm declines on power-segment destocking.

sources.label: Simply Wall St: 2026 guidance valuation check

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node lens: 300mm wafers consumed by AI fab/HBM capacity remain relevant, but no new order-timing info since June 9 and FY26 guide stays soft (EBIT below prior, price pressure). Hold.
verdicts.bull: Leverage to AI-driven fab and HBM capacity additions; 300mm end-markets still growing.
verdicts.neutral: Structurally relevant wafer node but FY26 guide soft; recovery hinges on order timing.
verdicts.bear: Weak FY26 EBIT, price pressure ex-LTAs, FX drag and export-control risk cap near-term upside.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI fab/HBM capacity additions lifting 300mm wafer orders
verdicts.primaryRisk: Pricing pressure / weak FY26 EBIT and export controls

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling lens: upstream wafer-substrate supply is a genuine bottleneck, but no scaling-relevant news since June 9 and soft FY26 guidance persists. Prior down already captured the rerating; hold now.
verdicts.bull: Upstream wafer-substrate supply is a hard physical bottleneck under any scaling regime.
verdicts.neutral: Bottleneck intact but soft FY26 fundamentals; no fresh catalyst.
verdicts.bear: Weak EBIT, price pressure and cyclicality dim near-term scaling-bottleneck monetization.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Scaling-driven fab capacity tightening wafer supply
verdicts.primaryRisk: Soft FY26 guide and pricing pressure
